title: cyathea lucida
intro: Cyathea lucida, also known as the 'soft tree fern', is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cyathea lucida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
